name: 15oz 6pk Plastic Kids' Bowls - Pillowfort™: Toddler Snack Bowls, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe
description: Bring a fun twist to your kid's mealtimes with this 6-Pack of Plastic Bowls from Pillowfort™. Made from a BPA-free material, these bowls feature a classic round shape, making them a great pick for serving cut fruits, snacks and much more. This pack includes six bowls, each showcasing a vibrant solid hue to add color and interest to snacking or mealtimes. Microwave safe for reheating only, you can toss them in the dishwasher for easy cleanup.
